sentences.target: Ich stelle den Kasten ins Regal.

translations.de: Ich stelle den Kasten ins Regal.
translations.en: I put the box on the shelf.
translations.es: Pongo la caja en el estante.
translations.fr: Je mets la boîte sur l'étagère.
translations.yue: 我將個箱擺喺層架上面。
translations.he: אני שם את הקופסה על המדף.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt cái hộp lên kệ.
translations.nl: Ik zet de doos op de plank.
translations.hi: मैं डिब्बा शेल्फ पर रखता हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive verb expressing placement, selecting an accusative object and a directional PP.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in the accusative case.
Two-way preposition contracted with the definite article ('in das'); governs accusative here to indicate direction into a target.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'ins' (accusative), denoting the destination.

sentences.target: Der Kasten ist heute wirklich schwer.

translations.de: Der Kasten ist heute wirklich schwer.
translations.en: The box is really heavy today.
translations.es: La caja está muy pesada hoy.
translations.fr: La boîte est vraiment lourde aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La scatola è davvero pesante oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这个箱子真的很重。
translations.pt: A caixa está muito pesada hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cái hộp thật sự rất nặng.
translations.nl: De doos is vandaag echt zwaar.
translations.hi: आज डिब्बा सच में बहुत भारी है.
translations.el: Το κουτί είναι σήμερα πραγματικά βαρύ.
translations.nb: Esken er skikkelig tung i dag.
translations.sv: Lådan är riktigt tung i dag.
translations.da: Kassen er virkelig tung i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は箱が本当に重い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Common noun, masculine; subject in the nominative case.
Copula auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Degree/intensifying adverb modifying the predicate adjective.
Adjective used predicatively as the subject complement.

sentences.target: Sie trägt den Kasten vorsichtig die Treppe runter.
sentences.reading: /ziː trɛːkt deːn ˈkastn̩ ˈfoːɐ̯zɪçtɪç diː ˈtrɛpə ˈʁʊntɐ/

translations.de: Sie trägt den Kasten vorsichtig die Treppe runter.
translations.ipa: /ziː trɛːkt deːn ˈkastn̩ ˈfoːɐ̯zɪçtɪç diː ˈtrɛpə ˈʁʊntɐ/
translations.en: She carries the box carefully down the stairs.
translations.es: Baja las escaleras con cuidado llevando la caja.
translations.fr: Elle descend prudemment les escaliers en portant la boîte.
translations.it: Scende le scale con attenzione portando la scatola.
translations.ko: 그녀는 상자를 조심스럽게 들고 계단을 내려가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她小心地拿着箱子下楼。
translations.yue: 佢小心咁拎住個箱落樓梯。
translations.ru: Она осторожно несёт коробку вниз по лестнице.
translations.pt: Ela desce as escadas com cuidado carregando a caixa.
translations.he: היא יורדת במדרגות בזהירות עם הקופסה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy cẩn thận mang cái hộp xuống cầu thang.
translations.ar: هي تنزل السلالم بحذر وهي تحمل الصندوق.
translations.nl: Ze loopt voorzichtig de trap af met de doos.
translations.uk: Вона обережно несе коробку сходами вниз.
translations.hu: Óvatosan viszi a dobozt le a lépcsőn.
translations.hi: वह सावधानी से डिब्बा लेकर सीढ़ियाँ उतरती है.
translations.el: Κατεβαίνει προσεκτικά τις σκάλες κρατώντας το κουτί.
translations.nb: Hun bærer esken forsiktig ned trappa.
translations.id: Dia dengan hati-hati membawa kotak menuruni tangga.
translations.sv: Hon bär lådan försiktigt nedför trappan.
translations.ro: Ea coboară cu atenție scările purtând cutia.
translations.cs: Ona opatrně nese krabici dolů po schodech.
translations.da: Hun bærer forsigtigt kassen ned ad trappen.
translations.fi: Hän kantaa laatikkoa varovasti alas portaita.
translations.ja: 彼女は箱を慎重に持って階段を下りる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 3rd person singular subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; part of a separable compound with the particle 'runter'; selects a direct object and a directional path phrase.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in the accusative case.
Manner adverb modifying the verb; indicates how the action is performed.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks the path NP 'Treppe' used with the directional particle.
Common noun, feminine; NP denoting the path ('down the stairs'), accusative within the directional construction.
Separable verb particle forming the compound verb with 'trägt'; encodes downward direction.

sentences.target: Im Kasten liegt das alte Werkzeug.

translations.de: Im Kasten liegt das alte Werkzeug.
translations.en: The old tools are in the box.
translations.es: Las herramientas viejas están en la caja.
translations.fr: Les vieux outils sont dans la boîte.
translations.it: Gli attrezzi vecchi sono nella scatola.
translations.pt: As ferramentas antigas estão na caixa.
translations.vi: Những dụng cụ cũ ở trong hộp.
translations.nl: Het oude gereedschap zit in de doos.
translations.hu: A régi szerszámok a dobozban vannak.
translations.el: Τα παλιά εργαλεία είναι στο κουτί.
translations.nb: De gamle verktøyene ligger i esken.
translations.id: Peralatan lama ada di dalam kotak.
translations.sv: De gamla verktygen ligger i lådan.
translations.da: Det gamle værktøj ligger i kassen.
translations.ja: 古い工具は箱の中にある。

tokens.explanation: Two-way preposition contracted with the dative article ('in dem'); marks a static location and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition in dative ('im Kasten').
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive stative verb indicating position.
Definite article, neuter nominative singular; marks the subject NP.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Werkzeug'; agrees in nominative neuter singular (ending -e) after definite article.
Common noun, neuter; collective singular functioning as the subject.

Sie trägt den Kasten vorsichtig die Treppe runter.
Im Kasten liegt das alte Werkzeug.
